visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A group of approximately eight young adults stands in a modern, brightly lit indoor living room. Most individuals are wearing casual white or black t-shirts and colorful conical party hats decorated with polka dots. A woman in a black tank top stands in the center foreground, holding a small plush doll with an exaggerated facial expression, while the others wave their hands and smile broadly toward the camera. (2) A man wearing a black button-down shirt stands against a backdrop of light-colored wooden cabinets. He is seen adjusting a large, red, honeycomb-textured decorative object shaped like a pineapple with green paper leaves. Another individual's head is partially visible in the bottom left corner as they observe the man's actions. (3) The scene shifts to a close-up view of a white ceramic bathtub being filled with water from a silver metallic faucet. A hand enters the frame from the side, dropping multiple red rose petals into the accumulating water. Several plush character toys, including SpongeBob SquarePants and Pikachu, are seen hanging from a metal shelf on the beige-tiled wall. (4) A woman stands in a bright indoor room wearing a large, tiered, white cardboard headpiece designed to look like a birthday cake, complete with three red paper candles on top. She holds a long-stemmed red rose between her teeth and smiles widely at the camera, with yellow and white flower graphics overlaid on her cheeks. (5) In a dimly lit hallway near an elevator, a man in a white t-shirt and shorts runs away from the camera in a playful, retreating manner. A woman follows him closely, holding a smartphone to film his escape. The hallway features wood-paneled walls and a mirrored elevator door reflecting the motion. (6) Back in the beige-tiled bathroom, the woman wearing the cake headpiece stands next to the bathtub. She interacts playfully with the man in white, eventually reaching out to grab him. She demonstrates significant physical effort, lifting the man off the ground with both arms and beginning to lower him into the tub. (7) The man in the white t-shirt is shown sitting in the bathtub, which is now overflowing with thick white foam and floating red rose petals. He is fully clothed, including white socks and green-striped sneakers. He laughs joyfully and splashes the foam around with his hands while others stand around the tub filming him with cameras and smartphones.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female assistant in a cake costume, and about 6 friends in the opening group shot.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male creator in a white t-shirt and white shorts. A female character wearing a large cardboard cake hat and a black tank top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video takes place in a modern apartment, moving from a living room with white walls and an air conditioner to a hallway with wooden paneling, and finally a bathroom with beige tiles, a white bathtub, and various colorful plush toys on the wall.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-intensity group cheering and applause, featuring high vocal arousal and positive valence. A medium-tempo pop background track with a prominent electronic beat and bright synthesizer textures starts immediately. Ambient room noise is low, dominated by the energetic collective vocal layers. (2) A sharp transition to conversational dialogue occurs as a male voice questions the decor with moderate pitch variability and a friendly, curious tone. Female laughter is heard in the background. The music drops in volume to a steady background bed while maintainings its rhythmic drive. (3) The continuous high-frequency broadband noise of running water from a faucet becomes the primary acoustic feature. A female voice speaks with a melodic, playful prosody. Occasional short, percussive splashing sounds are heard as objects hit the water, followed by muffled chatter. (4) The BGM shifts to a fast-paced, high-pitched comedic track resembling circus music. Vocal arousal spikes as multiple voices shout excitedly. High-frequency digital UI sound effects and comic stingers are used to emphasize the frantic, humorous atmosphere of the preparation. (5) Loud, sharp transient thuds from footsteps on a hard floor are heard as characters run. Intense female screaming and high-pitched laughter dominate the mix. The BGM remains fast and frantic, mirroring the high-speed pursuit heard through the acoustic signature of motion. (6) A high-arousal vocal exchange between a male and female voice takes place with sharp rising intonations. 'Whoosh' transition effects and comic 'ding' SFX are layered over the voices. Loud, wet splashing sounds with broad spectral energy signify significant water movement. (7) Sustained, boisterous laughter from multiple sources fills the audio field. High-pitched vocal exclamations from the male subject indicate surprise and amusement. The sound of vigorous water splashing and foam manipulation creates a dense, percussive texture that concludes the video.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document a humorous and chaotic birthday surprise for a colleague, featuring a 'human birthday cake' costume and a playful prank involving throwing the birthday subject into a rose-petal bubble bath.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific products are being promoted; the brand names visible in the background appear to be ordinary household items.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing and social-media style text overlays to enhance the comedic timing of the birthday prank.
